Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.model

Class Cell

java.lang.Object
com.example.battleship.model.Cell
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Cell extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an individual cell within the Battleship game board.

Tracks its grid coordinate, occupation by a vessel, and current cell state (EMPTY, OCCUPIED, WATER, HIT, or SUNK). Handles incoming shots and delegates hit/sink tracking to the assigned ship when applicable. Implements Serializable for game state saving.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Cell

      public Cell(Coordinate coordinate)
      Constructs a new Cell at the specified coordinate with default state CellState.EMPTY.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - Position on the grid.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If coordinate is null.

  • Method Details

    • getCellState

      public CellState getCellState()
      Gets the current state of this cell.
      Returns:
      Current CellState.

    • setCellState

      public void setCellState(CellState cellState)
      Sets the state of this cell.
      Parameters:
      cellState - New CellState to set.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If cellState is null.

    • getCoordinate

      public Coordinate getCoordinate()
      Gets the coordinate of this cell.
      Returns:
      Grid Coordinate.

    • getShip

      public Ship getShip()
      Gets the ship occupying this cell, if present.
      Returns:
      Occupying Ship, or null if empty.

    • assignShip

      public void assignShip(Ship ship)
      Assigns a ship to this cell and sets its state to CellState.OCCUPIED.
      Parameters:
      ship - The vessel to assign.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If ship is null.
      IllegalStateException - If the cell already contains a ship.

    • hasShip

      public boolean hasShip()
      Checks whether this cell is occupied by a ship.
      Returns:
      true if a ship is assigned; false otherwise.

    • receiveShot

      public CellState receiveShot() throws RepeatedShotException
      Processes an incoming shot directed at this cell.

      - Transitions EMPTY cells to WATER.
      - Transitions OCCUPIED cells to HIT and checks if the ship is completely SUNK.

      Returns:
      Resulting CellState (WATER, HIT, or SUNK).
      Throws:
      RepeatedShotException - If this cell was previously targeted.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the cell including coordinate and state.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      String descriptive of the cell state.
